---
title: "Blog"
page-layout: article
---

# Ecosystems · Health · Sustainability · Resilience

I’m a **systems thinker** connecting ecological science and human health to inform **sustainable, resilient** decisions.  
My work spans **disease ecology**, **freshwater & water systems**, **spatial modeling & uncertainty**, and **community-engaged** research.

**Recent posts** appear below. For an overview of what I do, see [Research](research.qmd) or [About](about.qmd).
